title: CMS.INITBYDIM
description: Initializes a Count-Min Sketch to dimensions specified by user

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Initializes a Count-Min Sketch to dimensions specified by user. ### Parameters: * **key**: The name of the sketch. * **width**: Number of counters in each array. Reduces the error size. * **depth**: Number of counter-arrays. Reduces the probability for an error of a certain size (percentage of total count). ## Examples ``` redis> CMS.INITBYDIM test 2000 5 OK ``` ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Supported
| ✅ Flexible & Annual
✅ Free & Fixed | | ## Return information **RESP2:** One of the following: * [Simple string reply]() `OK` if executed correctly. * [Simple error reply]() if the given key already exists. **RESP3:** One of the following: * [Simple string reply]() `OK` if executed correctly. * [Simple error reply]() if the given key already exists.
intro: Initializes a Count-Min Sketch to dimensions specified by user.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Initializes a Count-Min Sketch to dimensions specified by user.

sections.title: Parameters:
sections.content:
* **key**: The name of the sketch.
* **width**: Number of counters in each array. Reduces the error size.
* **depth**: Number of counter-arrays. Reduces the probability for an
    error of a certain size (percentage of total count).

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

One of the following:

* [Simple string reply]() `OK` if executed correctly.
* [Simple error reply]() if the given key already exists.

**RESP3:**

One of the following:

* [Simple string reply]() `OK` if executed correctly.
* [Simple error reply]() if the given key already exists.
